title: girlfriend of steel special edition PSP english patch
display_title: girlfriend of steel special edition PSP english patch
wikitext:
[]: girlfriend of steel special edition PSP english patch             Quote Post by Kaworu » Sun Jun 04, 2023 10:14 am hye guys. I did a thing. Download: https://github.com/tehmugi/patches_release

[]: Re: girlfriend of steel special edition PSP english patch             Quote Post by powermaiden02 » Thu Jun 29, 2023 10:23 am neat, would be cool if someone patched the Rei dreamcast game one.

[]: Re: girlfriend of steel special edition PSP english patch             Quote Post by Kaworu » Fri Jun 30, 2023 3:10 pm i dont usually deal with dreamcast. i've hacked a whole bunch of eva games i might or might not actually make a patch for so not going to go more into that. reverse engineering things is just a hobby and i do what i want so we'll see.. i do happen to be an eva geek so there's a chance i'll patch more of them in the future but for now, i need a break, this took me 2 years of work to fully fix all the stupidity the devs put in it.

[]: Re: girlfriend of steel special edition PSP english patch             Quote Post by powermaiden02 » Sat Jul 01, 2023 8:04 am dang, there's no way I could work for that long lol. either way thanks for making this man.

[]: Re: girlfriend of steel special edition PSP english patch             Quote Post by Kaworu » Fri Jul 21, 2023 3:56 pm it's just a hobby, i take it as it comes :P anyway, hope you enjou the game.

[]: Re: girlfriend of steel special edition PSP english patch             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Wed Aug 23, 2023 8:30 am Thanks for translating it.

[]: Re: girlfriend of steel special edition PSP english patch             Quote Post by asakuraikun » Sun Sep 17, 2023 11:16 am I'm currently playing the first one for PSP. Really well made, if I didn't know I could say it was an official version. Thanks for taking your time to translate it!

[]: Re: girlfriend of steel special edition PSP english patch             Quote Post by Kaworu » Tue Oct 24, 2023 1:43 pm thanks. i did try to be rather pedantic with the translation so thats always nice to hear, thoug im sure it has a typo or 2 since english is not my native language :P

[]: Re: girlfriend of steel special edition PSP english patch             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Tue Oct 24, 2023 2:42 pm Kaworu wrote: thanks. i did try to be rather pedantic with the translation so thats always nice to hear, thoug im sure it has a typo or 2 since english is not my native language :P

[]: Re: girlfriend of steel special edition PSP english patch             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Oct 25, 2023 7:53 am I do get that; some things just feel better in English than in one's native language. Eva in German for me would be absolute torture as well

[]: Re: girlfriend of steel special edition PSP english patch             Quote Post by Turismo030650 » Thu Oct 26, 2023 6:55 am Kaworu wrote: hye guys. I did a thing. Download: https://github.com/tehmugi/patches_release

[]: Re: girlfriend of steel special edition PSP english patch             Quote Post by Kaworu » Wed Nov 08, 2023 2:09 am The Killer of Heroes wrote: Kaworu#942157 wrote: thanks. i did try to be rather pedantic with the translation so thats always nice to hear, thoug im sure it has a typo or 2 since english is not my native language :P

[]: Re: girlfriend of steel special edition PSP english patch             Quote Post by TojiWasScrewedOver » Sat Nov 18, 2023 5:10 pm Always love to see Eva games getting english patches! Fantastic work!
